package handler

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct {
	ID     uint   `gorm:"primaryKey"`
	Name   string `gorm:"column:name"`
	Email  string `gorm:"column:email"`
	Status string `gorm:"column:status"`
	Role   string `gorm:"column:role"`
}

type UserRepository struct {
	db *gorm.DB
}

func (r *UserRepository) UpdateByMap(id uint, updates map[string]interface{}) error {
	return r.db.Model(&User{}).Where("id = ?", id).Updates(updates).Error
}

type UserHandler struct {
	repo *UserRepository
}

func (h *UserHandler) UpdateUserStatus(c *gin.Context) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	var req struct {
		Status string `json:"status"`
	}
	if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&req); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
		return
	}

	updates := map[string]interface{}{
		"status": req.Status,
	}

	if err := h.repo.UpdateByMap(id, updates); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "failed to update user"})
		return
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "user status updated"})
}

func (h *UserHandler) PatchUser(c *gin.Context) {
	id := c.Param("id")
	var body map[string]interface{}
	c.ShouldBindJSON(&body)

	updates := map[string]interface{}{
		"name":   body["name"],
		"email":  body["email"],
		"role":   body["role"],
		"status": body["status"],
	}

	if err := h.repo.UpdateByMap(id, updates); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "failed to patch user"})
		return
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"message": "user patched"})
}
